---
title: "Publications"
editor: visual
---

## Journal Publications

‚Ä†: equal contribution; ūüďß: corresponding author

### 2027

- To be updated

### Before joining Westlake

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Eutectic-Zn-MnO2_NatEng2026.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Eutectic-Zn-MnO2_NatEng2026_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Jinghan Li‚Ä†, Chang Li‚Ä†ūüďß, Bo Liu, Yuzhang Li and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Aqueous eutectic electrolytes suppress oxygen and hydrogen evolution for long-life Zn\|\|MnO2 dual-electrode-free batteries </em><br> Nat. Energy 2026, [DOI: 10.1038/s41560-025-01958-8](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41560-025-01958-8)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Steric-effect-Mg-electrolytes-JACS-2026.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Steric-effect-Mg-electrolytes-JACS-2026_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Rohith Srinivaas Mohanakrishnan, Jinghan Li, Rishabh D. Guha, Kristin A. Persson and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Unraveling the Steric Effect of Trialkyl Phosphates on the Solvation Sheath and Solid Electrolyte Interphase in High-Efficiency Magnesium Electrolytes </em><br> J. Am. Chem. Soc. 2026, [DOI: 10.1021/jacs.5c14645](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/jacs.5c14645)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Bare-Mg-interface_Joule2025.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Bare-Mg-interface_Joule2025_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Rishabh D. Guha, Stephen D. House, J. David Bazak, Yue Yu, Laidong Zhou, Kevin Zavadi, Kristin A. Persson and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> A dynamically bare metal interface enables reversible magnesium electrodeposition at 50 mAh cm-2 </em><br> Joule 2025, [DOI: 10.1016/j.joule.2024.11.007](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.joule.2024.11.007)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/CEPE-Mg-electrolyte_EES2024.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/CEPE-Mg-electrolyte_EES2024_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Rishabh D. Guha, Abhinandan Shyamsunder, Kristin A. Perssonūüďß and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> A weakly ion pairing electrolyte designed for high voltage magnesium batteries </em><br> Energy Environ. Sci. 2024, [DOI: 10.1039/d3ee02861e](https://doi.org/10.1039/D3EE02861E)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Amorphous-NaTaOCl4_ACSEnergyLett2024.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Amorphous-NaTaOCl4_ACSEnergyLett2024_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Laidong Zhou, J. David Bazak, Chang Li, and Linda F.Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> 4 V Na Solid State Batteries Enabled by a Scalable Sodium Metal Oxyhalide Solid Electrolyte </em><br> ACS Energy Lett. 2024, [DOI: 10.1021/acsenergylett.4c01855](https://doi.org/10.1021/acsenergylett.4c01855)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Zeolite-membrane-Mg_Joule2023.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Zeolite-membrane-Mg_Joule2023_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Abhinandan Shyamsunder, Baris Key, Zhuo Yu and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Stabilizing magnesium plating by a low-cost inorganic surface membrane for high-voltage and high-power Mg batteries </em><br> Joule 2023, [DOI: 10.1016/j.joule.2023.10.012](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.joule.2023.10.012)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Hybrid-eutectic-electrolyte-anodefree_NatCommun2023.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Hybrid-eutectic-electrolyte-anodefree_NatCommun2023_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Ryan Kingsbury, Arashdeep Singh Thind, Abhinandan Shyamsunder, Timothy T. Fister, Robert F. Klie, Kristin A. Perssonūüďß and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Enabling selective zinc-ion intercalation by a eutectic electrolyte for practical anodeless zinc batteries </em><br> Nat. Commun. 2023, [DOI: 10.1038/s41467-023-38460-2](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-38460-2)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Na3B5S9_AngewChemIntEd2023.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Na3B5S9_AngewChemIntEd2023_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Laidong Zhou, J.David Bazak, Baltej Singh, Chang Li, Abdeljalil Assoud, Nancy M.Washton, Vijayakumar Murugesan and Linda F.Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> A New Sodium Thioborate Fast Ion Conductor: Na3B5S9 </em><br> Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2023, [DOI: 10.1002/anie.202300404](https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202300404)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Waxing-Cathode-SSB_ACSEnergyLett2023.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Waxing-Cathode-SSB_ACSEnergyLett2023_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Yangyang Huang, Laidong Zhou, Chang Li, Zhuo Yu and Linda F.Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Waxing Bare High-Voltage Cathode Surfaces to Enable Sulfide Solid-State Batteries </em><br> ACS Energy Lett. 2023, [DOI: 10.1021/acsenergylett.3c01717](https://doi.org/10.1021/acsenergylett.3c01717)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Li3‚ąíxZrx(Ho-Lu)1‚ąíxCl6_ACSEnergyLett2023.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Li3‚ąíxZrx(Ho-Lu)1‚ąíxCl6_ACSEnergyLett2023_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Laidong Zhou, Tongtong Zuo, Chang Li, Qiang Zhang, J√ľrgen Janekūüďß and Linda F.Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Li3‚ąíxZrx(Ho/Lu)1‚ąíxCl6 Solid Electrolytes Enable Ultrahigh-Loading Solid-State Batteries with a Prelithiated Si Anode </em><br> ACS Energy Lett. 2023, [DOI: 10.1021/acsenergylett.3c00763](https://doi.org/10.1021/acsenergylett.3c00763)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Ca‚ÄďNa-NaSICON-NVP_ChemMater2023.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Ca‚ÄďNa-NaSICON-NVP_ChemMater2023_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Lauren E. Blanc, Yunyeong Choi, Abhinandan Shyamsunder, Baris Key, Saul H. Lapidus, Chang Li, Liang Yin, Xiang Li, Bharat Gwalani, Yihan Xiao, Christopher J. Bartel, Gerbrand Cederūüďß and Linda F.Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Phase Stability and Kinetics of Topotactic Dual Ca2+‚ąíNa+ Ion Electrochemistry in NaSICON NaV2(PO4)3 </em><br> Chem. Mater. 2023, [DOI: 10.1021/acs.chemmater.2c02816](https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.chemmater.2c02816)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/ZIB-commentary_Joule2022.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/ZIB-commentary_Joule2022_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Shuo Jin, Lynden A. Archerūüďß and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Toward practical aqueous zinc-ion batteries for electrochemical energy storage </em><br> Joule 2022, [DOI: 10.1016/j.joule.2022.06.002](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.joule.2022.06.002)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/DOTF-additive_Joule2022.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/DOTF-additive_Joule2022_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Abhinandan Shyamsunder,cAlexis Grace Hoane, Daniel M. Long, Chun Yuen Kwok, Paul G. Kotula, Kevin R. Zavadil, Andrew A. Gewirthūüďß and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Highly reversible Zn anode with a practical areal capacity enabled by a sustainable electrolyte and superacid interfacial chemistry </em><br> Joule 2022, [DOI: 10.1016/j.joule.2022.04.017](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.joule.2022.04.017)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Proton-Intercation-PEG_ACSEnergyLett2022.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Proton-Intercation-PEG_ACSEnergyLett2022_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li, Ryan Kingsbury, Laidong Zhou, Abhinandan Shyamsunder, Kristin A. Persson and Linda F. Nazarūüďß</strong><br> <em> Tuning the Solvation Structure in Aqueous Zinc Batteries to Maximize Zn-Ion Intercalation and Optimize Dendrite-Free Zinc Plating </em><br> ACS Energy Lett. 2022, [DOI: 10.1021/acsenergylett.1c02514](https://doi.org/10.1021/acsenergylett.1c02514)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/ZnV2O4_NanoEnergy2020.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/ZnV2O4_NanoEnergy2020_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Yi Liu, Chang Li, Jia Xu, Mingyang Ou, Chun Fang, Shixiong Sun, Yuegang Qiu, Jian Peng, Gongchang Lu, Qing Li, Jiantao Hanūüďß, Yunhui Huang</strong><br> <em> Electroactivation-induced spinel ZnV2O4 as a high-performance cathode material for aqueous zinc-ion battery </em><br> Nano Energy 2020, [DOI: 10.1016/j.nanoen.2019.104211](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.nanoen.2019.104211)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Core-Shell-PBAs_ChemSusChem2019.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Core-Shell-PBAs_ChemSusChem2019_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Jinwen Yin‚Ä†, Yi Shen‚Ä†, Chang Li‚Ä†, Chenyang Fan, Shixiong Sun, Yi Liu, Jian Pengūüďß, Li Qing and Jiantao Hanūüďß</strong><br> <em> In Situ Self-Assembly of Core‚ÄďShell Multimetal Prussian Blue Analogues for High-Performance Sodium-Ion Batteries </em><br> ChemSusChem 2019, [DOI: 10.1002/cssc.201902013](https://doi.org/10.1002/cssc.201902013)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Ce-PBAs_ACSApplEngMater_2019.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Ce-PBAs_ACSApplEngMater_2019_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Jian Peng,‚Ä† Chang Li,‚Ä† Jinwen Yin,‚Ä† Jinsong Wang, Yonghui Yu, Yi Shen, Ju Fang, Annan Chen, Yue Xu, Ratul Rehman, Chun Fang, Ling Miao, Renzhi Jiang, Qing Li, Jiantao Hanūüďß, and Yunhui Huang</strong><br> <em> Novel Cerium Hexacyanoferrate(II) as Cathode Material for Sodium-Ion Batteries </em><br> ACS Appl. Energy Mater. 2019, [DOI: 10.1021/acsaem.8b01686](http://dx.doi.org/10.1021/acsaem.8b01686)
:::
::::

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Ti-Substitution-Na3V2(PO4)3_ESM2018.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/BeforeJoiningWestlake/Ti-Substitution-Na3V2(PO4)3_ESM2018_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Yangyang Huang, Xiang Li,, Jinsong Wang, Lin Miao, Chang Li, Jiantao Hanūüďß and Yunhui Huangūüďß</strong><br> <em> Superior Na-ion storage achieved by Ti substitution in Na3V2(PO4)3 </em><br> Energy Storage Materials 2018, [DOI: 10.1016/j.ensm.2018.03.021](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ensm.2018.03.021)
:::
::::

## Seminar Presentations

:::: pub-item
<a href="publications/SeminarPresentations/20231127_MRS 2023 Fall_Final.pdf" target="_blank"> <img src="publications/SeminarPresentations/20231127_MRS 2023 Fall_Final_cover.jpg" class="pub-cover"/> </a>

::: pub-text
<strong> Chang Li and Linda F. Nazar </strong><br> <em> Electrode/Electrolyte Interface Control for Multivalent-Ion Batteries with High Stability and Reversibility </em><br> Materials Research Society (MRS) Fall Meeting 2023, Boston, Nov. 27th, 2023
:::
::::
